message:
feat(cli,tui): expand bind/overlay/dashboard commands and help component

- Expand bind command with additional keybinding configuration
- Expand overlay command with additional management options
- Dashboard CLI launch option additions
- Expand help component with additional keybinding documentation
- Dashboard TUI rendering improvements
